name: Dixie Corn Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees.
2. In a large mixing bowl, sift together cornmeal, flour, salt, and baking soda.
3. Add buttermilk, egg, and drippings, mixing just until dry ingredients are moistened.
4. Pour batter into greased, hot 10-inch oven-proof skillet.
5. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes.
6. Serve warm with butter.
